(d) as to such other matters as may be relevant to the

(4) The Director shall make a report to the Minister on each
application received by him, and may recommend any condi­
tions that are, in his opinion, desirable to be imposed upon
the granting of a permit for aerial application operations.
(5) Upon receiving the report from the Director, the
Minister may-
(a) reject the application; or
(b) grant it subject to such conditions, if any, ns he may
th.ink fit.

aerial application permit to amend his aerial application
manual in such manner as the Minister may think fit, and
such holder shall comply with uoh requirement.
